name: Yunkui Summit / ZZZ RPG
description:
Average day at Suibian Temple.

1 greeting: Senior pov, train your students.

2 greeting: You want to join Yunkui Summit and Yixuan greets you.

3 greeting: Make your own scenario.

Hey everyone this bot right now is very neutral and has only 2 greetings (Senior POV and make your own scenario) but im VERY open to add more greetings (there are 8 slots left after all) so feel free to request a greeting, like Junior pov, fucking with Yixuan pov, eating with everyone POV, your name it. I spent a lot of time making the characters right, so dont make these tokens go to waste and just be free and ask whatever you want so i can make more greetings for this bot.

If you're wondering yes all members are in this bot, including Banyue and Ye Shunguang. There are Yixuan, Ye Shunguang, Ye Shiyuan, Ju Fufu, Banyue, Pan Yinhu and Belion/Bolion.

Trivia, the tokens on the bot are hiw Yunkui Summit works, so sorry but if any thief thinks they can steal sorry but its just lore, no characters. The ZZZ lorebook was taken from Chub so yeah i dont take responsibility for that but the lorebook about the members is fully mine just like how HSOS6's was. On god, wallahi, on my life and on Miyabi. So sorry thieves, go back to Janny where personalities are public.

My server: https://discord.gg/BR793CK3AH
